case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. SITEWORX RECYCLING, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT SITEWORX RECYCLING, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
